mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, plan_detail_id = #{planDetailId}, day_number = #{dayNumber}, plan_name = #{planName}, training_date = #{trainingDate}, intensity = #{intensity}, duration = #{duration}, distance = #{distance}, show_training_info = #{showTrainingInfo} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.avatar, CASE WHEN pl.user_id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS liked_by_current_user FROM posts p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post_likes pl ON p.id = pl.post_id AND pl.user_id = #{currentUserId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO post_likes (post_id, user_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
